Automatic Cultural Familiarity and Language study:If you are in a foreign
land and interacting with the locals in day-to-day life, you can claim an 
automatic 4 hours per day toward both the local Language and Cultural
Familiarity with the local culture (see p. 23).
Hours of automatic Cultural Familiarity study (4/day):
Hours of automatic Language study (4/day): 
Automatic study on the job:If your job involves a skill (and most do) 
you can count 
1⁄4 of the time spent on the job as “study.” This time may 
be split between multiple, job-related skills.

NPC Record Card
To make it easy to keep track of NPCs, all necessary data can be kept on a 3” ¥ 5” card. A box-
ful of foes is easy to use; you can even use a paper clip to fasten the appropriate Cardboard
Heroesfigure to each card.
